content:
Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) is a government-backed term insurance scheme offering Rs 2 lakh life cover at just Rs 436 per year (Rs 1.19 per day). It is deducted automatically from your bank account and renewed annually.

## PMJJBY at a Glance

- **Sum Assured:** Rs 2 lakh (fixed)
- **Annual Premium:** Rs 436 (auto-debit from bank)
- **Age:** 18 to 50 years (coverage until 55)
- **Death Benefit:** Rs 2 lakh to nominee on policyholder's death
- **No Medical Exam:** Required enrollment through bank only
- **Tenure:** Annual renewal — not a lifelong policy

## The Problem with PMJJBY as Your Only Cover

Rs 2 lakh sounds like a lot — but consider this: If your family depends on your Rs 40,000/month income, they need roughly Rs 40-50 lakh to maintain their lifestyle for 10 years. PMJJBY covers just Rs 2 lakh — less than 5% of what they actually need.

I have met families in Gorakhpur where the breadwinner had only PMJJBY. When they passed away, the Rs 2 lakh lasted barely 3-4 months.

## PMJJBY as a Supplement (Good Strategy)

PMJJBY makes excellent sense as a cheap add-on, not as your main cover. Here is the recommended layered approach:

1. **LIC Jeevan Amar (Term Plan):** Rs 1 crore cover at Rs 7,000-10,000/year — this is your main protection
2. **PMJJBY:** Rs 2 lakh at Rs 436/year — keep it running as a low-cost extra layer
3. **PMSBY (Accident Insurance):** Rs 2 lakh at Rs 20/year — include this too

Total cost: approximately Rs 8,000-10,500/year for Rs 1.04 crore combined cover. That is comprehensive protection.

## LIC Jeevan Amar vs PMJJBY — Quick Comparison

| Feature | PMJJBY | LIC Jeevan Amar |
|---|---|---|
| Sum Assured | Rs 2 lakh | Up to Rs 5 crore |
| Premium | Rs 436/year | Rs 7,000-15,000/year |
| Coverage | Till age 55 | Till age 80 |
| Renewal | Annual | Fixed term |
| Medical | No | Required above certain sum assured |

**Conclusion:** Enrol in PMJJBY through your bank (if you have not already — it takes 5 minutes). Then call Ajay Kumar Poddar at 9415313434 to add a proper LIC term plan on top.
contentHi:
PMJJBY मात्र ₹436/वर्ष में ₹2 लाख का कवर देती है — लेकिन यह पर्याप्त नहीं है। एक परिवार जो ₹40,000/माह पर निर्भर है उसे ₹40-50 लाख की जरूरत है।

बेस्ट स्ट्रैटेजी: PMJJBY को चालू रखें, ऊपर से LIC जीवन अमर टर्म प्लान (₹1 करोड़) जोड़ें। कुल लागत ₹8,000-10,500/वर्ष — पूरा परिवार सुरक्षित।

9415313434 पर कॉल करें।
